column1: # Base: locked config (QK=5.5, WD=0.64, TTT, sliding, EMA)
# LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000 on all rows — script default is 30 (OOM), 0 raises ValueError.
# All params above confirmed best on Spark — now probing ARCHITECTURE vars.
# These have NEVER been tested on any machine.
# NUM_LOOPS: default=2 (layers loop ×2). Try ×3 — more effective depth, free compute.
# LOOP_START/END: default=3-5 (3 layers loop). Try 2-6 (5 layers) — wider recurrence.
# PARALLEL_RESIDUAL_START: default=7. Try 5 — parallel path covers more network.
# TIMEOUT_SECS=2700 — ~150 steps ~50 min on Nano at ~1800 tok/s.
